_doc: Manual expansion overrides for zones the rule-based classifier in
clean_eq2_zones.py gets wrong (typically the name-keyword heuristic
blindly matching a substring that belongs to a later-revisit zone).
Each key is the EXACT zone name as it appears in eq2_zones.json.
Vanilla, BC, SS, DoF, KoS, EoF, RoK, TSO, SF, DoV, AoD, CoE,
ToV, AoM, ToT, KA, PoP, CD, BoL, RoS, VoV, RoR, BoZ, SoD, RoC.
Keys starting with '_' (like this one) are ignored by the loader so
we can keep documentation in the same file.

The Fabled Temple of Cazic-Thule.reason: Introduced via LU100 (July 2015), mid-AoM cycle. Fabled revamp of the vanilla Cazic-Thule zone.

New Halas.reason: City zone released alongside Sentinel's Fate (Feb 2010); no instance-suffix category to trigger location prefix matching.

New Halas: Citizenship.reason: Citizenship quest line for New Halas (SF era).

Plane of Sky.reason: Original Kingdom of Sky (Feb 2006) signature zone.

Deathfist Citadel.reason: Original Shattered Lands group zone in Zek (2004). The wiki tags this as 'introduced in LU33' which dates the LU33 *revamp* (Nov 2006, EoF era), not the zone's original introduction. The Assault and Onslaught sub-zones are already correctly attributed to Vanilla.
